description: MAP-Elites behavioral archive — tracks ATLAS variants in 3D behavior space (planning_depth × tool_diversity × verification_rate, each 0-3 bin index)

planning_depth.description: Does the variant plan ahead multiple steps or react greedily?

tool_diversity.description: Does it use many tools in combination or rely on a narrow set?

verification_rate.description: How often does it self-check before committing?

variants.label: ATLAS-baseline

task-001.notes: Deep multi-step trace across fleethost+memcontext; explicit hypothesis before synthesis

task-002.notes: Glob+Grep+Read+Bash combined; found dead deps and missing zod declaration

task-003.notes: Every claim cross-validated with independent source; scheduler XML + daemon log corroborated

variants.notes: Seed variant — current master ATLAS, all capabilities enabled, no dialect restrictions

variants.label: ATLAS-memory-constrained

task-001.notes: Memory-only dialect: can recall prior traces but cannot do systematic multi-file reads; reactive first-pass synthesis from recollection

task-002.notes: Restricted to recall_memory, journal_write, capture_insight, load_proposals — no Glob/Grep/Read/Bash; narrow tool surface

task-003.notes: Can cross-check via recalled facts and prior session crystals; weaker than code-level verification but still structured self-checking

variants.notes: Probe variant — context/memory tools only. No spawn_agent, no shell, no direct file builds. First probe of low planning_depth / low tool_diversity cell. Purpose: create selection gradient by occupying a distinct behavioral region.
